name: Manage Sales Order Overpayments
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a sales order's total is less than the amount paid on it the order is overpaid. An overpayment acts as a credit on the customer's account, but does not behave the same as a regular customer account. You have the option on how you'd like the overpayment credit to be used by your customer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Overpayments will display in sales orders with a negative amount owing. The overpayment will also display on the customer card as a credit under the "}, {"text": "Account", "bold": true}, {"text": " section. So that it is not confused with a regular account credit, the overpayment credit will show the related sales order ID as well as an option to refund the credit from the customer card."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Causes of an Overpayment"}], "data-id": "causes-of-an-overpayment"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are two common scenarios that lead to overpayments:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sales order is created with an amount owing, and a customer makes payment against it for more than the amount owing."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sales order is created as fully paid, and is edited in the control panel so that amount paid exceeds amount owing."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Modify paid orders by "}, {"text": "creating an RMA"}, {"text": " instead of removing orderlines."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Identify Overpaid Orders"}], "data-id": "identify-overpaid-orders"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To find sales orders that are overpaid:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Sales Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Expand the search filters and find the "}, {"text": "Paid Status", "bold": true}, {"text": " filter."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Over Paid", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the drop down menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Apply advanced filter", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders that have been overpaid are displayed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Resolve an Overpayment"}], "data-id": "process-an-overpayment"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An overpayment is money owed to your customer, that needs to be re-allocated. There are 3 different ways you can resolve an overpayment."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Apply the Overpayment to a Sales Order"}], "data-id": "apply-the-overpayment-to-a-sales-order"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your customer wishes to make another purchase, you can "}, {"text": "apply the overpayment credit to a sales order"}, {"text": " as a payment method."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can only do this on the sales order in the control panel. The overpayment credit cannot be used by the customer on the checkout page."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Refund the Overpayment Credit to the Customer"}], "data-id": "refund-the-overpayment-credit-to-the-customer"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your customer prefers a refund, open the customer card and click the "}, {"text": "Pay refund", "bold": true}, {"text": " button next to the overpayment credit amount. Full steps can be found in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1587-manage-customer-credits#2", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This removes the credit in Neto, it doesn't initiate a transfer to your customer. You will still need to refund/transfer the credit amount through your payment gateway or bank account."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Convert an Overpayment to a Customer Credit"}], "data-id": "convert-an-overpayment-to-a-customer-credit"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your customer would like to use the credit on a future order, you can convert it to a customer credit:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the customer card and scroll down to the Account section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Take a note of the overpayment amount, and click the "}, {"text": "Pay refund", "bold": true}, {"text": " button next to the overpayment credit amount."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Now enter the overpaid amount into the "}, {"text": "Manually Add Credit to Account", "bold": true}, {"text": " field and click the "}, {"text": "Add", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your customer can now use their credit as a payment method during checkout on your webstore."}]}]
